display.purpose: Landing page hero headings only. Never used inside the dashboard.

headline.purpose: Page titles, section headings, modal titles.

title.purpose: Card headings, panel titles, table column headers.

body.purpose: All descriptive text, finding messages, incident descriptions. 65–75ch max line length.

label.purpose: Section identifiers, field labels. Geist Mono uppercase. Never prose.

mono.purpose: Rule IDs (TF013), file paths, commit SHAs. Geist Mono uppercase. Classifies, never narrates.

shadows.name: card-hover-glow
shadows.purpose: Interactive card hover state only. Paired with border shift to rgba(63,140,255,0.25). Never on resting surfaces.

shadows.name: button-primary-bloom
shadows.purpose: Always-on ambient ring on .dg-button-primary. Communicates importance, not depth.

shadows.name: button-primary-hover-bloom
shadows.purpose: Replaces default bloom on .dg-button-primary:hover. Brighter glow + inner highlight.

shadows.name: panel-inset
shadows.purpose: Subtle bottom-border on panel elements. Structural, 1px only.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing. Exponential out — fast start, gradual settle.

motion.name: ease-spring
motion.purpose: Micro-interactions only (logo pulse). No bounce on layout elements.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary CTA. Alert Electric background. Use for the single most important action on a surface.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M3 8h10M9 4l4 4-4 4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>Install DriftGuard</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #3f8cff; color: white; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 6px; border: none; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(63,140,255,0.4), 0 8px 24px -6px rgba(63,140,255,0.4); transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 80ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); position: relative; overflow: hidden; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #62a0ff; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(63,140,255,0.3), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.12); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); transition-duration: 80ms; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3f8cff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent background with structural border. Appears alongside or below primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: transparent; color: #e8eaed; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #262b34; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 80ms; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #3a414d; background: #0c0e12; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.97); transition-duration: 80ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3f8cff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Panel
components.description: Base container. Terminal Surface background with Grid Line border. Used for all dashboard cards.
components.html:
LAST ANALYSIS
2 minutes ago
UP2CLOUD/driftguard-test-iac · PR #4
components.css: .ds-panel { background: #0c0e12; border: 1px solid #1a1e25; border-radius: 4px; padding: 16px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui; color: #e8eaed; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-panel:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px -8px rgba(63,140,255,0.12); border-color: rgba(63,140,255,0.25); } .ds-panel-label { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: #525c6b; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-panel-value { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; color: #e8eaed; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-panel-meta { font-size: 12px; color: #9aa0a6; }

components.name: Severity Badges
components.description: Finding classification. Tinted background (15% opacity severity color), full-opacity text. Four states: critical / high / medium / low.
components.html: CRITICALHIGHMEDIUMLOW
components.css: .ds-badges-demo { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.12em; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 2px; line-height: 1.5; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge-critical { background: rgba(255,71,87,0.15); color: #ff4757; } .ds-badge-high { background: rgba(255,136,0,0.15); color: #ff8800; } .ds-badge-medium { background: rgba(255,176,32,0.15); color: #ffb020; } .ds-badge-low { background: rgba(82,92,107,0.25); color: #9aa0a6; }

components.name: Finding Row
components.description: Signature component. Dense data row: badge | rule-id | message | file:line. The most-read component in the dashboard.
components.html:
CRITICALTF013S3 bucket has public ACL — allows unrestricted read accessmain.tf:12
HIGHGHA001Unpinned action ref — use commit SHA instead of branch tag.github/workflows/ci.yml:18
MEDIUMK8S002Container missing CPU and memory resource limitsk8s/deployment.yaml:34
components.css: .ds-findings { background: #0c0e12; border: 1px solid #1a1e25; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui; } .ds-finding-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid #1a1e25; transition: background 120ms linear; } .ds-finding-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .ds-finding-row:hover { background: #11141a; } .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.12em; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 2px; line-height: 1.5; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-badge-critical { background: rgba(255,71,87,0.15); color: #ff4757; } .ds-badge-high { background: rgba(255,136,0,0.15); color: #ff8800; } .ds-badge-medium { background: rgba(255,176,32,0.15); color: #ffb020; } .ds-rule-id { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: #525c6b; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0; min-width: 48px; } .ds-finding-msg { font-size: 13px; color: #e8eaed; flex: 1; min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-file-ref { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #525c6b; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Mono Label
components.description: Operational classifier. Geist Mono uppercase. Never prose — only rule codes, status identifiers, field labels.
components.css: .ds-mono-demo { display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; background: #0c0e12; padding: 16px; border-radius: 4px; } .ds-mono-label { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: #525c6b; white-space: nowrap; }

narrative.overview:
DriftGuard is a tool that speaks like a senior engineer: no noise, high signal. Every pixel earns its place by reducing time-to-decision. The visual system is built from the terminal outward — a near-void canvas, surfaces that stack in tonal layers, and a single electric accent that fires only when something needs attention. When the accent appears, it is the finding. When the surface is dark and still, the system is waiting.

Typography is information-first: Inter at tight weights for structure, Geist Mono in uppercase for operational labels (rule IDs, severity codes, file paths). The monospace layer is the second voice of the system — it never decorates, it classifies. Density is a feature.

This system explicitly rejects the compliance-portal aesthetic: stiff data tables, navy/corporate palettes, copy written for auditors rather than engineers. DriftGuard is a live operational instrument, not a report generator.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-native: calibrated for terminal environments, not retrofitted from a light theme
Tonal depth: five surface layers with no shadows as structure
Electric accent as operational signal: appears on active states, primary actions, and live indicators only
Severity palette as a second signal system: critical/high/medium/low each carry their own unmistakable hue
Mono labels as a classification layer: uppercase Geist Mono at 10–11px for rule IDs, statuses, file references
Motion is sparse and purposeful: slide-up reveals, glow pulses, scan animations — never decorative

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Alert Electric is used on ≤10% of any given screen surface. It signals action and live state. If everything is electric, nothing is.

rules.name: The Severity Exclusivity Rule
rules.body: Severity colors appear only on severity badges, finding rows, and severity-scoped charts. Never repurposed as decorative accents, hover states, or branding elements.

rules.name: The Mono Classification Rule
rules.body: Geist Mono in uppercase never carries prose. It identifies: rule codes, file references, severity levels, timestamps. If it would read as a sentence, it is wrong.

rules.name: The Base-14 Rule
rules.body: Body text is 14px minimum. 12px appears only in secondary mono labels where uppercase and tracking compensate for reduced size.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Shadows appear only as state responses (hover, active) or as importance signals (primary button). A surface at rest casts no shadow. Use a tonal layer instead.

dos: Do use Alert Electric exclusively for actionable and live-state signals. Its rarity is its meaning.
Do use Geist Mono uppercase for all machine-readable identifiers: rule IDs, file paths, commit SHAs, severity codes.
Do express depth through tonal surface layers. When you need 'deeper', use surface-raised; when you need 'floating', use overlay + blur.
Do use severity colors only in their designated role: findings, badges, severity-scoped charts.
Do keep finding row hover state as a background transition only — dense data tables do not lift physically on hover.
Do include prefers-reduced-motion fallbacks for every animation.
Do size primary buttons at 13px font-weight 500 with px-3.5 py-2.
Do use text-wrap: balance on headings and text-wrap: pretty on multi-line body paragraphs.
donts: Don't use the compliance-portal aesthetic: no navy/corporate palette, no stiff audit-table layouts, no copy written for regulators.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient). Severity and status are communicated through solid color.
Don't add structural box-shadows to resting surfaces. Shadows are state-only or importance-only.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards or list items.
Don't put glassmorphism on anything except the nav-transition overlay and modals.
Don't use chart overload. Surface the 3–5 metrics that change a decision.
Don't use eyebrows (small uppercase tracked text) as default section scaffolding inside the app.
Don't soften severity. Critical findings are #ff4757. They are not amber. They are not orange.
Don't use Alert Electric on decorative or ambient elements. It signals action. Dilution destroys the signal.
